UpdateLogStore.retention: Log store retention period, max 3650 days; -1 means permanent. Unit: days
UpdateLogStore.tags: List of tags to create, see below for parameter format
UpdateLogStore.tags.tagKey: Tag key, supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /., length 1-65
UpdateLogStore.tags.tagValue: Tag value, supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /., length 0-65
UpdateLogStore.shardCount: Initial shard count for the log store, default 1, max 50
UpdateLogStore.disableShardAutoSplit: Whether to disable automatic shard splitting
